name: Turkey-Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Turkey, cooked, diced (from Braised Turkey, Drumsticks)
recipeInstructions:
- Mix turkey, celery, potato, onion, and green pepper.
- Mix salad dressing, mustard, and salt. Stir lightly into the turkey mixture.
- Chill until ready to serve. This recipe makes 2 servings of about 1 cup each, with 230 calories per serving.
